description: Vision-bearing tasks shaped like a 8gent Computer session: parse a screenshot, plan a click, describe an accessibility tree.

tasks.title: Screenshot identification
tasks.prompt: What primary colour fills this image? Answer with one word.

tasks.title: Click target reasoning
tasks.prompt: You see a UI mock with a single button labelled 'Submit'. Where on the screen would a user click? Reply with the rough region: top, middle, or bottom.

tasks.title: Accessibility tree parsing
Short conversational reply (chat tier)
tasks.prompt: User just said: 'open the messages app'. Reply with one short confirmation sentence. No tool calls.

tasks.title: Plan-from-screenshot
tasks.prompt: You see this screen. The user said 'find the search bar'. Write the next single action as a JSON object with fields {action, target}. If no search bar is visible, action should be 'report' with target 'no-search-bar-found'.
